summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment must obtain INT (Instance Nationale des Télécommunications) homologation before import or sale in Tunisia under the Code des Télécommunications (Loi 2001-1 modifiée) and its implementing decrees. The INT homologation certificate is mandatory for any wireless device including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT modules. INT manages spectrum licensing and type approval; CE test reports may be informally considered by INT as technical evidence but do not substitute for Tunisian homologation. CCC and SRRC approvals are not recognised by INT.
summary.zh: 依据突尼斯电信法典（Loi 2001-1 modifiée）及其实施法令，所有无线电及电信终端设备须在进口或于突尼斯销售前取得INT（国家电信局）型式核准。INT型式核准证书对包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及物联网模块在内的任何无线设备均为强制要求。INT负责频谱许可及型号核准管理；CE测试报告可作为技术证据供INT非正式参考，但不能替代突尼斯型式核准。CCC及SRRC批准不被INT承认。
summary.zht: 依據突尼斯電信法典（Loi 2001-1 modifiée）及其實施法令，所有無線電及電信終端裝置須在進口或於突尼斯銷售前取得INT（國家電信局）型式核准。INT型式核准證書對包括Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及物聯網模組在內的任何無線裝置均為強制要求。INT負責頻譜許可及型號核准管理；CE測試報告可作為技術證據供INT非正式參考，但不能替代突尼斯型式核准。CCC及SRRC批准不被INT承認。

standards_or_laws: Code des Télécommunications — Loi 2001-1 du 15 janvier 2001 relative aux télécommunications (Tunisia, as amended)
INT homologation procedures for radio and telecom terminal equipment
ETSI EN 300 328 (Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz), ETSI EN 301 893 (Wi-Fi 5 GHz), ETSI EN 300 440 (short-range devices / Bluetooth) — referenced for technical testing
INT spectrum management regulations for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands

summary.en: China requires MIIT/SRRC radio type approval for RF transmitters under MIIT Order No. 14 of 2016, a MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment, and CCC for applicable RF equipment categories. Testing references GB standards (GB 9254 / GB 17625 for EMC, GB 4943 for safety). Neither SRRC approval nor CCC is recognised by INT.
summary.zh: 中国依据工信部第14号令对射频发射设备要求MIIT/SRRC无线电型号核准，对电信终端设备要求工信部进网许可证（NAL），对适用类别无线设备要求CCC认证。测试参照GB标准（EMC：GB 9254 / GB 17625；安全：GB 4943）。SRRC批准和CCC均不被INT承认。
summary.zht: 中國依據工信部第14號令對射頻發射設備要求MIIT/SRRC無線電型號核准，對電信終端裝置要求工信部進網許可證（NAL），對適用類別無線設備要求CCC認證。測試參照GB標準（EMC：GB 9254 / GB 17625；安全：GB 4943）。SRRC批准和CCC均不被INT承認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT/SRRC Radio Type Approval (MIIT Order No. 14 of 2016)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for applicable RF equipment
GB 9254 / GB 17625 (EMC), GB 4943 (safety), GB/T 22450 (WLAN radio performance)

gap.en: INT homologation is a fully independent certification from SRRC, CCC, or CE mark — none of these are accepted by INT as a substitute. A fresh application to INT with ETSI-referenced or IEC-referenced test reports from a recognised laboratory is required. CE test reports may be submitted as supporting technical evidence but INT issues its own homologation certificate. Absence of INT homologation renders import and sale of the device illegal in Tunisia.
gap.zh: INT型式核准与SRRC、CCC或CE标志完全独立——INT不接受上述任何认证作为替代。须向INT提交全新申请，并提供来自认可实验室的基于ETSI或IEC参考标准的测试报告。CE测试报告可作为支持性技术证据提交，但INT另行签发其自身的型式核准证书。未取得INT型式核准将导致设备在突尼斯的进口及销售属于违法行为。
gap.zht: INT型式核准與SRRC、CCC或CE標誌完全獨立——INT不接受上述任何認證作為替代。須向INT提交全新申請，並提供來自認可實驗室的基於ETSI或IEC參考標準的測試報告。CE測試報告可作為支持性技術證據提交，但INT另行簽發其自身的型式核准證書。未取得INT型式核准將導致裝置在突尼斯的進口及銷售屬於違法行為。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China SRRC approval, CCC, and CE mark do not satisfy INT homologation requirements. A separate INT homologation process with ETSI/IEC-referenced test reports from a recognised laboratory is required before any wireless or telecom terminal device may be imported or sold in Tunisia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC批准、CCC及CE标志均不满足INT型式核准要求。任何无线或电信终端设备在突尼斯进口或销售前，须另行完成基于ETSI/IEC参考测试报告（来自认可实验室）的INT型式核准流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC批准、CCC及CE標誌均不滿足INT型式核准要求。任何無線或電信終端裝置在突尼斯進口或銷售前，須另行完成基於ETSI/IEC參考測試報告（來自認可實驗室）的INT型式核准流程。
